title: Batch Search Import
explain: Please click on the following Tutorial Guide button to download instruction materials for Batch Search Import
note: The file for importing must be less than 400MB. Otherwise, please contact administrator
download-tutorial: Your file is ready to download.
ms-choose-file: Please choose a file to import
ms-format-vaild:
File format entered is invalid.
Batch Search Import supports only following formats: *.zip.
ms-error-search-info: Search Exception: Can not get search information.
ms-transfer: Ballistics IQ has received your file upload and is analyzing your Probe Images. You can check this upload's status (including notice of any failed records) from Batch Search --> View Batch Search.
ms-condition: The file for importing must be less than 400MB. Otherwise, please contact administrator
includena-help:
Image records may have data fields not available and assigned a value of "N/A".
   • When selected, any image with an "N/A" value in any data field will be included in the search results. By default, the N/A box is checked.
   • For example, if you are searching for a MALE subject, images with a Gender value of "N/A" will be included in your search results.
   • If the N/A box is NOT checked, all records with a Gender value of "N/A" will be excluded from the search.
   • It is advised to select the N/A box unless you want to limit your search results with fields only with valid data.
file-format-1: Images files can be of the following format: jpg, jpeg, bmp, png.
file-format-2: All images that needed to Search Ballistic are contained in one folder and must be zipped into a single file using type of format is zip( *.zip). Customer can use any application have feature compress and un compress files with ".zip" format to make ".zip" files. Ex: WinZip, WinRar,...
